sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
for i, n in enumerate(nodes):
    if n['pixels'] <= 40 and n['color'] not in ['G', 'c', 'B']:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        cr = (min(rows)+max(rows))//2
        cc = (min(cols)+max(cols))//2
        print(i, n['color'], n['pixels'], cr, cc)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
